generated_oml:
instance MotorEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor encoder mounted on the motor for measuring angular position and speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData MotorEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance SecondaryEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Secondary encoder behind the gearbox for measuring angular position and speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SecondaryEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance CurrentSensor : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Current sensor within Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl controller for measuring motor current"
    DTDFVocab:producedData CurrentDataTransmitted
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom MotorEncoder
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SecondaryEncoder
]

instance CurrentDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom CurrentSensor
]

instance MotorEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MotorEncoderSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular speed data from motor encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SecondaryEncoderPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular position data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SecondaryEncoderSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Angular speed data from secondary encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance CurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Motor current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Permanent magnet synchronous motor for input current I_M and torque τ_M output"
]

instance Gearwheel : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Gearwheel for torque τ_G output"
]

instance CycloidalGearbox : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Cycloidal gearbox for torque τ_out output"
]

instance FirstAxisSystem : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "The MABI MAX 100 industrial robot's first axis system"
    base:contains PermanentMagnetSynchronousMotor, Gearwheel, CycloidalGearbox
]

instance TwinningProcess : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Purpose-driven methodology involving problem identification (friction detection), asset and model analysis, simulation model creation (e.g., Coulomb-Viscous, Stribeck), and data trace identification, following MBSE principles with continuous refinement"
]

instance FirstAxisDigitalModel : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Digital twin model of the first axis of the MABI MAX robot"
]

instance FirstAxisDigitalShadow : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Single digital shadow instance focused exclusively on the first axis of the MABI MAX robot"
    base:contains FirstAxisDigitalModel
]

instance SysMLBDD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Block Definition Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance SysMLIBD : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "SysML Internal Block Diagram for structural modeling of the first axis"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo SysML
]

instance CoulombViscousModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Coulomb-Viscous friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance StribeckModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Stribeck friction model for simulation"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredCurrentData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor current data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData CurrentDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angular position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredMotorSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured motor angular speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData MotorEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredGearPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gear angular position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredGearSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured gear angular speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredOutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angular position data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance MeasuredOutputSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Measured output angular speed data"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SecondaryEncoderPositionSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo MATLABSimulink
]

instance SimulatedMotorPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated motor angular position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SimulatedGearPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated gear angular position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SimulatedOutputPositionData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Simulated output angular position data"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance AssetAdministrationShell : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Asset Administration Shell for data linking"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SysML : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "SysML for structural modeling"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MATLABSimulink : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MATLAB Simulink for simulation of friction and motor behavior"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance MQTT : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for data streaming from physical sensors to digital twin"
    DTDFVocab:enables FrictionIdentificationService, MotionAccuracyImprovementService, RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance SiemensSINUMERIK840DslCNCController : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Siemens SINUMERIK 840D sl CNC controller for physical robot control"
    DTDFVocab:enables MotionAccuracyImprovementService
]

instance DashboardVisualizationTools : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Dashboard visualization tools for real-time visualization"
    DTDFVocab:enables RealTimeVisualizationService
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot first axis state via dashboard"
    DTDFVocab:provides VisualizationInsight
]

instance FrictionIdentificationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Continuous identification of static, kinetic, and viscous friction using white-box and black-box models"
    DTDFVocab:provides FrictionModelInsight
]

instance MotionAccuracyImprovementService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Motion accuracy improvement through friction model integration in robot control"
    DTDFVocab:provides AdjustControlParametersAction
]

instance FrictionModelInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Friction model identification results"
]

instance AdjustControlParametersAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Adjust control parameters for enhanced motion accuracy in the robot's first axis"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic true
]

instance VisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time visualization of robot state"
]

instance twinning_time_scale : DTDFVocab:TimeScale [
    base:desc "Real-time data processing with live measurements and continuous model updates during robot operation."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "Integration of physical robot components, sensor data via MQTT, AAS-enabled data trace linking, SysML and Simulink models, and dashboard visualization for unified monitoring and analysis."
]

instance life_cycle_stages : DTDFVocab:EvolutionStage [
    base:desc "As-operated stage, utilizing live operational data to monitor and improve real-time motion accuracy during robot usage."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "Validation through deviation analysis between simulated data (from friction models) and measured reference data to ensure accuracy in friction loss detection."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "MQTT protocol for real-time streaming of sensor data from physical robot to digital shadow."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "Adherence to Asset Administration Shell (AAS) standards and SysML modeling language for system architecture description."
]
